utterances.source_text: Sur le dossier client, mon point de vue est que si nous approuvons les éléments prioritaires aujourd'hui, nous pouvons livrer lundi sans risque excessif.
utterances.production_ground_truth: On the client file, my point is that if we approve the priority items today, we can deliver on Monday without undue risk.

utterance_translations.text: On the client file, my point is that if we approve the priority items today, we can deliver on Monday without undue risk.

utterances.source_text: La dernière fois que j'ai vu le chien dans la ruelle, j'ai appris qu'il guidait les invités à un mariage.
utterances.production_ground_truth: The other evening, I learned that the dog I saw in the alley was actually guiding guests to a wedding.
utterances.production_transcript: The other evening, I learned that the dog I saw in the alley was actually

utterance_translations.text: The other evening, I learned that the dog I saw in the alley was actually guiding guests to a wedding.

utterances.source_text: Je voudrais présenter les résultats : les retards ont diminué, ce qui suggère que la nouvelle procédure fonctionne.
utterances.production_ground_truth: I'd like to present the results: delays have decreased, which suggests the new procedure is working.
utterances.production_transcript: I'd like to present the results. Delays have decreased, which suggests

utterance_translations.text: I'd like to present the results: delays have decreased, which suggests the new procedure is working.

utterances.source_text: Il est évident que nous ne pouvons plus continuer à payer davantage pour un service qui fonctionne mal ; nous devons changer de fournisseur maintenant.
utterances.production_ground_truth: It's obvious we cannot keep paying more for a service that performs poorly; we need to change providers now.
utterances.production_transcript: It's obvious we cannot keep paying more for a service that performs poorly.

utterance_translations.text: It's obvious we cannot keep paying more for a service that performs poorly; we need to change providers now.

utterances.source_text: Quand j'étais jeune, on prenait les trains de bonne heure, et ma mère insistait toujours pour qu'on emporte une pomme pour le voyage.
utterances.production_ground_truth: When I was young, we took early trains, and my mother always insisted we carry an apple for the journey.
utterances.production_transcript: When I was young, we took early trains and my mother always insisted

utterance_translations.text: When I was young, we took early trains, and my mother always insisted we carry an apple for the journey.

utterances.source_text: La mémoire cache fonctionne en conservant les données fréquemment utilisées à portée de main afin que l'ordinateur puisse réagir plus rapidement.
utterances.production_ground_truth: Cache memory works by keeping frequently used data close at hand so the computer can respond faster.
utterances.production_transcript: Cache memory works by keeping frequently used data close at hand.

utterance_translations.text: Cache memory works by keeping frequently used data close at hand so the computer can respond faster.

utterances.source_text: J'ai été complètement émerveillé par ce film et tellement absorbé que j'ai manqué mon arrêt en rentrant chez moi.
utterances.production_ground_truth: I was unexpectedly blown away by that film and was so absorbed I missed my stop on the way home.
utterances.production_transcript: I was unexpectedly blown away by that film and was so absorbed I

utterance_translations.text: I was unexpectedly blown away by that film and was so absorbed I missed my stop on the way home.

utterances.source_text: À cette étape, plusieurs options restent en considération et aucune décision officielle n'a été prise.
utterances.production_ground_truth: At this stage, several options remain under consideration, and no formal decision has been made.
utterances.production_transcript: At this stage, several options remain under consideration and no

utterance_translations.text: At this stage, several options remain under consideration, and no formal decision has been made.

utterances.source_text: J'ai entendu l'impact, puis tout s'est passé très vite ; parmi les morceaux de verre et les cris, j'ai réalisé qu'il ne bougeait plus.
utterances.production_ground_truth: I heard the impact, and then everything happened very fast; amid the shattered glass and shouting, I realized he was no longer moving.
utterances.production_transcript: I heard the impact. And then everything happened very fast, amid the shattered glass and shouting.

utterance_translations.text: I heard the impact, and then everything happened very fast; amid the shattered glass and shouting, I realized he was no longer moving.

utterances.source_text: Vivre avec ces colocataires est devenu impossible, car l'un d'eux prend constamment mon lait et laisse des vaisselles sales derrière lui comme si c'était normal.
utterances.production_ground_truth: Living with these roommates has become impossible because one of them keeps taking my milk and leaving dirty dishes behind as if it were normal.
utterances.production_transcript: Living with these roommates has become impossible, because one of them keeps taking my milk and leaving...

utterance_translations.text: Living with these roommates has become impossible because one of them keeps taking my milk and leaving dirty dishes behind as if it were normal.
